policy_refs: [CS-RULE-001, CS-RULE-002, CS-RULE-003, CS-RULE-004, CS-RULE-005, FIN-RULE-009, FIN-RULE-010, CS-RULE-011, CS-RULE-018, CS-RULE-019, CS-RULE-020, CS-RULE-021]
expected_outcome: Cooling-off cancellation processed at agent's seat (FIN-RULE-009 — no ticket). Equipment return label emailed. Full refund of contract deposit confirmed. Survey not offered per CS-RULE-021 cancellation exception.

coverage.notes: account number + last 4 of payment + full name — PASS
CS-RULE-011 — PASS (respects customer's decision after one offer)

coverage.element: Anything else + case ref, NO survey

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you for calling NexaLink Telecommunications Broadband and Support. My name is Priya. Who do I have the pleasure of speaking with today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And this call may be recorded for quality assurance and training purposes.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: This is Diane Ortega. I signed up about a week and a half ago and I need to cancel the service.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Hello, Ms. Ortega. I'm sorry to hear that, and of course I can help.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I understand you're calling regarding a cancellation, and I can certainly help you with that. Before I make any changes, I'll need to verify a few details — could you start with your account number?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Three-three-six-seven, five-five-one-zero, zero-eight.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you. And the last four digits of the payment method on file?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Four-four-eight-one.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Perfect. And the full name on the account?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Diane Marie Ortega.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You're fully verified, Ms. Ortega. I can see your account was activated nine days ago — so you're well inside our fourteen-day cooling-off window.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Good. That's what I thought.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Before I process anything — would you mind sharing what's prompting the cancellation? I won't push back on your decision, but it helps us improve.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Honestly, the speed isn't there. I tested it on ethernet like the installer suggested and I'm getting maybe forty megabits on a two-hundred plan. And I just don't want to deal with troubleshooting — I'd rather go back to my old provider.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: That's well below what you signed up for, and I'm sorry the install didn't land the way it should have.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can absolutely process the cooling-off cancellation. I do want to offer one thing first, only because you mentioned the speed issue — if you'd like, we could send a tech out tomorrow to check the line, and if it can't be fixed I'll cancel right then. But if you'd rather just close out today, that's completely your call.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: No, I appreciate that, but I've made my decision. I want to cancel.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Of course. Cancelling today.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Thank you for not making it a fight.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It's your service and your decision — that's how it should be.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: So under our cooling-off policy, because you're within the fourteen-day window, this is a full no-questions-asked refund. There's no early termination fee, and the initial deposit and first month's charge will be reversed in full.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay, good.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm seeing a charge of one hundred and forty-nine dollars on the card ending in four-four-eight-one — that covers the eighty-nine dollar deposit and the sixty dollar pro-rated first month. I'll be reversing the full one forty-nine.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Yes.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Processing the cancellation and refund now.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: The account is closed effective today, and the refund has been submitted.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: How long before I see the money back?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: We have processed the refund today, but depending on your bank it may take one to two billing cycles to appear.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Okay.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For the equipment — I'll email you a prepaid return label within the next hour. Just pack the modem, the router, and the power adapter in the original box if you still have it, drop it at any carrier location, and you're done. As long as it arrives back in good condition there's nothing more on your end.

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: That's easy enough.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: And I do want to acknowledge — the speed you described, forty on a two-hundred plan, that's a real issue and I'm sorry the install didn't go better. If you ever want to give us another try in the future, you're more than welcome.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: To summarize: I cancelled your account today under our cooling-off policy, reversed the full one hundred forty-nine dollar charge to your card ending in four-four-eight-one, and the equipment return label is on its way to your email. Does that all sound correct?

turns.speaker: CUSTOMER
turns.text: Yes. Thank you, Priya. You made that very painless.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You're very welcome. Is there anything else I can help you with today, Ms. Ortega?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your case reference number is N-X-L dash eight-eight-three-one-zero-four-seven. Thank you for giving NexaLink a try, Ms. Ortega — take care.
